body.visualDesc: Close-up of Pip looking directly at the camera with a warm inviting smile, head tilted, one wing cupped to her ear as if listening to the viewer. The sleeping lemon-yellow duckling with flat orange bill is cradled in the golden straw nest beside her. CRITICAL: NO whole egg anywhere in the shot - the egg has hatched; at most two small EMPTY broken eggshell halves lie beside the nest. Soft dusk light glows on the porch. Pip's eyes sparkle with warmth.
